name: Text Tools
description: Browser-based utilities for counting, converting, cleaning, and transforming text.

tools.name: Word Counter
tools.description: Count words, characters, sentences, paragraphs with reading and speaking time estimates.

tools.name: Character Counter
tools.description: Count characters with and without spaces in real time for tweets and bios.

tools.name: Case Converter
tools.description: Convert text to UPPERCASE, lowercase, Title Case, Sentence case and more.

tools.name: Lorem Ipsum Generator
tools.description: Generate placeholder dummy text by paragraphs, sentences or words.

tools.name: Remove Line Breaks
tools.description: Strip or merge line breaks and extra newlines from pasted text.

tools.name: Remove Extra Spaces
tools.description: Remove duplicate, leading and trailing whitespace from text.

tools.name: Find and Replace Text
tools.description: Find and replace words or patterns in bulk text, with regex support.

tools.name: Reverse Text
tools.description: Reverse characters, words or lines of any input text.

tools.name: Text Repeater
tools.description: Repeat a string or line a chosen number of times.

tools.name: Word Frequency Counter
tools.description: Count how often each word appears and rank them by frequency.

tools.name: Remove Duplicate Lines
tools.description: Delete duplicate lines from a list while preserving order.

tools.name: Sort Text Lines
tools.description: Sort lines alphabetically, numerically or reverse their order.

tools.name: Text to Slug
tools.description: Convert a title or phrase into a clean URL-friendly slug.

tools.name: Binary Translator
tools.description: Convert text to binary and binary back to readable text.

tools.name: Morse Code Translator
tools.description: Encode and decode between text and Morse code, with optional audio.

tools.name: Fancy Text Generator
tools.description: Turn text into stylish Unicode fonts for social media bios.

tools.name: Bionic Reading Converter
tools.description: Bold the leading part of each word to aid faster reading.

tools.name: Text to Handwriting
tools.description: Render typed text as realistic handwriting on paper.

tools.name: Title Case Converter
tools.description: Apply proper title capitalization rules to headlines.

tools.name: Text Diff Checker
tools.description: Highlight additions and deletions between two blocks of text.

tools.name: Whitespace Remover
tools.description: Strip all whitespace or collapse multiple spaces into one.

tools.name: Add Line Numbers
tools.description: Prepend sequential line numbers to each line of text.

tools.name: Text to ASCII Art
tools.description: Convert words into large ASCII banner art.

tools.name: NATO Phonetic Alphabet
tools.description: Spell text using the NATO phonetic alphabet.

tools.name: Strikethrough Text Generator
tools.description: Add strikethrough or underline Unicode styling to text.

tools.name: Upside Down Text
tools.description: Flip text into upside-down Unicode characters.

tools.name: Remove Punctuation
tools.description: Strip punctuation marks from text for clean processing.

tools.name: Text to Speech
tools.description: Read typed text aloud using the browser speech synthesis API.

tools.name: Sentence Counter
tools.description: Count sentences and average sentence length in text.

tools.name: Capitalize Each Word
tools.description: Capitalize the first letter of every word in the input.
